ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-FIERY_WRATH.title: Fiery Wrath
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-FIERY_WRATH.descriptio: This card gains [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. When played, take [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage and permanently increase this card's damage by [blue]{DamageScaling}[/blue].
ARQPHOENIXANCIENT-FIERY_WRATH.extraCardT: Take [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage and permanently increase this card's damage by [blue]{DamageScaling}[/blue].
